forbids: authored generation source calling engine RNG, Math.random, official generators, or internal mapgen-core RNG
why: Swooper authored generation owns deterministic RNG policy instead of reaching through engine/runtime generator APIs.
message: Keep authored generation off engine RNG and official generators.
exceptionPath: mods/mod-swooper-maps/src/recipes/standard/stages/placement/steps/place-discoveries/materialize.ts may materialize official discoveries until that generator is replaced.
